name: LA Legal Video Pros
address: 9000 Wilshire Blvd, Suite 200, Beverly Hills, CA 90212
description: Los Angeles premier deposition videography service. Multi-camera setups, real-time streaming to remote attorneys, and expedited video-to-transcript synchronization.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The multi-camera setup caught every detail. Our trial team was thrilled.
Streaming quality was flawless for our remote co-counsel in New York.
Most professional legal videographer in LA, hands down.

sentiment.summary: Top-rated in LA with exceptional marks for multi-camera work and streaming reliability.

name: Pacific Deposition Video
address: 1100 S. Flower St, Suite 300, Los Angeles, CA 90015
description: Full-service legal videography covering all of Southern California. Specializing in complex litigation, mass tort depositions, and remote participation setups.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Covered depositions across 5 Southern California counties for our mass tort case.
Remote participation setup worked well but audio had minor issues initially.

sentiment.summary: Strong regional coverage and mass tort expertise; minor technical hiccups noted.
